files.patch: @@ -84,0 +84,2 @@ + * @throws IllegalStateException if an unobservable + * block is encountered @@ -87,2 +89,2 @@ - if (declaringBlock().isEntryBlock() && - declaringBlock().ancestorOp() instanceof Op.Invokable o) { + Block b = declaringBlock(); + if (b.isEntryBlock() && b.ancestorOp() instanceof Op.Invokable o) { @@ -97,0 +99,2 @@ + * @throws IllegalStateException if this parameter's declaring block is + * unobservable @@ -129,1 +133,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if the target block is being built and is not observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if the target block is + * unobservable @@ -133,1 +138,1 @@ - throw new IllegalStateException("Target block is being built and is not observable"); + throw new IllegalStateException("Target block is unobservable"); @@ -654,0 +659,1 @@ + * @throws IllegalArgumentException if there are more output values than entry block parameters @@ -686,0 +692,1 @@ + * @throws IllegalArgumentException if there are more output values than entry block parameters @@ -836,1 +843,1 @@ - // @@@ The alternative is to close the body builder on failure, rendering it inoperable, + // @@@ The alternative is to finish the body builder on failure, rendering it inoperable,

@@ -81,1 +81,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if an unobservable block + * is encountered @@ -91,1 +92,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if an unobservable block + * is encountered @@ -101,1 +103,1 @@ - // Throws ISE if encountering block being built + // Throws ISE if an unobservable block is encountered @@ -112,1 +114,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if an unobservable block + * is encountered @@ -120,1 +123,1 @@ - // Throws ISE if block is not built + // Throws ISE if an unobservable block is encountered @@ -126,1 +129,1 @@ - // Throws ISE if encountering block being built + // Throws ISE if an unobservable block is encountered @@ -137,1 +140,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if an unobservable block + * is encountered @@ -142,1 +146,1 @@ - // Throws ISE if encountering block being built + // Throws ISE if an unobservable block is encountered @@ -145,1 +149,1 @@ - // Throws ISE if encountering block being built + // Throws ISE if an unobservable block is encountered @@ -148,1 +152,1 @@ - // Throws ISE if encountering block being built + // Throws ISE if an unobservable block is encountered @@ -158,1 +162,0 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable. @@ -176,1 +179,0 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable. @@ -204,1 +206,0 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable.

@@ -139,0 +139,1 @@
+     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if there are more output values than entry block parameters

@@ -69,1 +69,2 @@ - * being built is not observable through this operation and any attempt to access the block results in an exception. + * being built is not observable through this operation and + * any attempt to access the block throws {@link IllegalStateException}. @@ -417,2 +418,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if this operation is attached and the parent block is being built and is not - * observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if this operation is attached and its parent block is + * unobservable. @@ -428,1 +429,1 @@ - throw new IllegalStateException("Parent block is being built and is not observable"); + throw new IllegalStateException("Parent block is unobservable"); @@ -498,1 +499,0 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable.

@@ -55,1 +55,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if the declaring block is being built and is not observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if the declaring block is + * unobservable @@ -59,1 +60,1 @@ - throw new IllegalStateException("Declaring block is being built and is not observable"); + throw new IllegalStateException("Declaring block is unobservable"); @@ -70,2 +71,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if this value is a block parameter and its declaring block is being built and is - * not observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if the declaring code element is a block and that block is + * unobservable @@ -75,1 +76,1 @@ - case Block.Parameter _ -> block; + case Block.Parameter _ -> declaringBlock(); @@ -133,1 +134,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if this value's declaring block is being built and is not observable. + * @throws IllegalStateException if this value's declaring block is + * unobservable @@ -137,1 +139,1 @@ - throw new IllegalStateException("Declaring block is being built and is not observable"); + throw new IllegalStateException("Declaring block is unobservable"); @@ -161,1 +163,0 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable. @@ -200,1 +201,0 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an encountered block is being built and is not observable.
